🎉 Create a Board

Bring Distributed Teams Closer Together

Distance shouldn't prevent meaningful recognition. WorkKudo makes it possible for remote and globally distributed teams to celebrate, appreciate, and connect — regardless of location or timezone.

Connect Your Remote Team See How It Works
🌍 Global Teams⏰ Async-First📱 Any Device
WorkKudo · Remote Workforce
W

"Celebrating from Singapore — so grateful to be part of this team 🌏"

Wei L. · Singapore
A

"Distance never felt smaller. Thank you for including everyone 💛"

Amara K. · Lagos
J

"Signed from Toronto — this board made my entire week! 🎉"

James P. · Toronto
⚡ The Challenge

Remote Employees Miss Out on the Recognition Moments That Build Culture

In-office birthday cakes, hallway congratulations, and after-work celebrations simply don't reach remote employees. The informal recognition that builds culture in physical offices is invisible online.

WorkKudo creates digital-first recognition experiences that are just as meaningful for a teammate in a different timezone as they are for someone sitting across the desk.

01Remote employees are less likely to receive spontaneous recognition than in-office peers
02Timezone differences mean remote workers miss real-time celebrations
03Without a digital-first platform, recognition is limited to those physically present
04Distributed teams struggle to build shared culture without shared experiences
✨ Key Milestones Board
🎂Birthday

Happy Birthday, Sarah!

"Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! Thank you for bringing so much energy and passion to the product team every single day."

M
Marcus VanceDirector of Product
🏆Milestone

Happy 5-Year Work Anniversary!

"Five years of absolute dedication, building code bases, and leading our team to success. We are incredibly lucky to have you, David."

E
Elena RostovaVP of Engineering
🎖Promotion

Congrats on the Promotion!

"So well-deserved, Clara! Your leadership during the Q1 launch was outstanding. Excited to see you excel in your new Senior Manager role!"

J
James PatelHead of Operations
✦ How WorkKudo Helps

Recognition Built for How Distributed Teams Actually Work

WorkKudo is async-first, mobile-ready, and globally accessible so no remote employee is ever left out.

⏰
01

Async-First Design

Contributors add messages on their own schedule — no need to coordinate across timezones.

🌍
02

Global Accessibility

WorkKudo works in every country, on every device, with no geographic restrictions or limitations.

📱
03

Mobile-Optimized

Full contribution experience on any smartphone — remote employees can participate from anywhere.

💬
04

Notion Integration

Recognition shared inside Notion workspaces, where teams already document and collaborate.

🔔
05

Timezone-Aware Reminders

Contribution reminders reach employees at appropriate times, accounting for global distribution.

📥
06

Digital Delivery

Finished recognition experiences are delivered digitally via email or shareable link — wherever the recipient is.

→ Process

How It Works

🌍
1

Create the Experience

Launch a board or recognition campaign accessible to your entire global team.

📩
2

Invite Globally

Share a link that works anywhere in the world — no VPN, no account, no barriers.

⏰
3

Async Contributions

Team members contribute in their own time, from their own location, on their own device.

🎉
4

Deliver Everywhere

The completed experience is delivered digitally to the recipient, wherever they are.

◉ Use Cases

Remote Workforce In Action

Real scenarios where WorkKudo delivers meaningful results

🎂

Remote Birthdays

Ensure remote employees receive a board signed by the whole team on their birthday.

🏆

Global Recognition Programs

Run recognition campaigns that reach every team member regardless of geography.

🎉

Virtual Team Celebrations

Celebrate project launches, milestones, and wins with a team spread across the world.

👋

★ Why It Matters

Real Results for Real Teams

The measurable impact of building a culture of appreciation

🌍

Stronger Remote Culture

Shared digital recognition experiences build culture for teams that never share a physical space.

🔗

Increased Connection

Remote employees who receive recognition feel more connected to their team and organization.

💬

Better Engagement

Recognition that reaches remote employees consistently drives higher engagement and morale.

✅

Improved Participation

Async-first design removes timezone and schedule barriers that typically reduce remote participation.

🤝

Greater Inclusion

Every recognition experience reaches all employees equally — no matter where they work.

📈

Reduced Remote Attrition

Remote employees who feel seen and appreciated are significantly more likely to stay.

Bring your global team together through shared experiences, digital celebrations, and appreciation that reaches everyone — anywhere.
